rationale: The citing paper does not build its core theory, hypotheses, or empirical models on De Wilde et al. (2008). It cites that paper briefly in the General Discussion/Future Research section as one possible explanation of number-of-level effects (attentional contrast) when proposing future interaction tests with scale expansion. The citation is grouped and background-oriented, with no direct reuse of the cited paper's mechanism tests, design, or estimation approach in the main studies.
